x-enumeration-literals.name: Payee or Creditor Account
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Account of the creditor where the funds are to be credited. 

The account of the creditor to which a credit entry will be posted as a result of the payment transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payer or Debtor Account
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Account of the debtor from where funds are to be taken for the payment order. 

the account of the debtor to which a debit entry will be made as a result of the transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debtor Agent Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: The account of the debtor's agent. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Creditor Agent Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: The account of the creditor agent at its servicing agent to which a credit entry will be made as a result of the payment transaction. (ISO20022)
